name: File Sharing Bot - Enhanced
description: Telegram File Sharing Bot with Premium, Requests, Admin Chat, and more.

DATABASE_URL.description: MongoDB connection URL from MongoDB Atlas

FORCE_SUB_CHANNEL.description: Force subscribe channel ID, set 0 to disable

JOIN_REQUEST_ENABLED.description: Set True to use join requests instead of direct subscribe

REQUEST_CHANNEL_ID.description: Channel ID where movie/anime requests are posted (optional)

ADMINS.description: Space-separated list of admin user IDs

PROTECT_CONTENT.description: Set True to prevent files from being forwarded

AUTO_DELETE_MSG.description: Message shown before file is deleted. Use {time} placeholder.
AUTO_DELETE_MSG.value: ⏳ This file will be deleted in {time} seconds. Please save it!

AUTO_DEL_SUCCESS_MSG.description: Message shown after file is deleted.

START_PIC.description: URL of image to show on /start

FORCE_SUB_MESSAGE.description: Message shown when force subscribe is required.

CUSTOM_CAPTION.description: Custom caption for files. Use {filename} and {previouscaption}.

FREE_DAILY_LIMIT.description: Max daily file downloads for free users

DISABLE_CHANNEL_BUTTON.description: Set True to disable Share URL button on channel posts
